title: cordia rufescens
intro: Cordia rufescens, also known as the Red Bark Cordia, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. In herbal medicine, Cordia rufescens can be prepared into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
